Name: Zone1
Description: Where the expedition first broke through. Quiet groves and the bones of old wagons.

Name: Zone2
Description: Mist hangs low here and never lifts. The trees seem to grieve.

Name: Zone3
Description: Cold rivers braid through stone channels older than any map.

Name: Zone4
Description: The canopy closes overhead and the wood grows hard as iron.

Name: Zone5
Description: A drowned palace of some court that ruled before the gods were wild.

Name: Zone6
Description: Caverns lit by stones that remember the moon.

Name: Zone7
Description: The wind here carries voices. None of them are lying.

Name: Zone8
Description: Cliffs that climb into a sky that never settles.

Name: Zone9
Description: Titanic vertebrae form a stair toward the realm's last door.

Name: Zone10
Description: The end of the path. Something vast is waiting to be woken.
